creator: bhaga@absoludicrous.com
text:
Andrej,

I have included the diff -r/patch inline in this e-mail:


diff -r irssistats/Makefile /home/toast/irssistats.new/Makefile
9c9
< PORTVERSION=  0.73
---
> PORTVERSION=  0.75
diff -r irssistats/distinfo /home/toast/irssistats.new/distinfo
1,3c1,3
< MD5 (irssistats-0.73.tar.gz) = 98cb47c84ecc79a652d2366ae73f73d1
< SHA256 (irssistats-0.73.tar.gz) = a34bf0a7568469fb47413998be8118b68ae6479933c6f61559a3a3378ef6aff7
< SIZE (irssistats-0.73.tar.gz) = 53612
---
> SHA256 (irssistats-0.75.tar.gz) = 7aabbdb55158299997f82a39f1b403339a4ad74b4679030f317a27042d87eb90
> MD5 (irssistats-0.75.tar.gz) = f3654fd292220bd9adada7ff6c7f0421
> SIZE (irssistats-0.75.tar.gz) = 54434
diff -r irssistats/files/patch-Makefile /home/toast/irssistats.new/files/patch-Makefile
1,3c1,3
< --- Makefile.orig     Mon Feb  7 16:57:05 2005
< +++ Makefile  Mon Jul  3 00:01:52 2006
< @@ -1,20 +1,26 @@
---
> --- Makefile.orig     Fri Nov 30 11:30:17 2007
> +++ Makefile  Fri Nov 30 11:33:57 2007
> @@ -1,21 +1,25 @@
9,10c9,11
< +PRE = $(PREFIX)
< +BIN = $(PREFIX)/bin
---
> -CFLAGS ?= -O2
> +PRE = ${PREFIX}
> +BIN = ${PREFIX}/bin
17c18
< -     gcc -O2 -o irssistats irssistats.c
---
> -     gcc $(CFLAGS) -o irssistats irssistats.c
26d26
< +



Regards,

Ben Haga
<bhaga@absoludicrous.com>


On Mon, 03 Dec 2007 15:17:01 +0300, Andrej Zverev <andrey.zverev@electro-com.ru> wrote:
> Dear Submitter.
> 
> Can you please provide patch over existing port instead of creating shar ?
